channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: प्रेम पियाला जो पिये, शीश दक्षिणा देय । लोभी शीश न दे सके, नाम प्रेम का लेय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: He who drinks the cup of love gives his head as a gift. The greedy cannot give their head but still speak of love.

Translation: He who drinks love's cup gives his life. The greedy cannot, yet they speak of love.
item.guid: प्रेम पियाला जो पिये, शीश दक्षिणा देय । लोभी शीश न दे सके, नाम प्रेम का लेय ॥492954

item.title: कबीर सोई पीर है, जो जाने पर पीर । जो पर पीर न जानई, सो काफिर बेपीर ॥
item.description:
Meaning: He is a true saint who knows others' pain. He who does not is heartless.

Translation: A true saint feels others' pain. He who doesn't is without a soul.
item.guid: कबीर सोई पीर है, जो जाने पर पीर । जो पर पीर न जानई, सो काफिर बेपीर ॥492955

item.title: पोथी पढ़ि पढ़ि जग मुआ, पंडित भया न कोय । ढाई आखर प्रेम का, पढ़े सो पंडित होय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Reading books the world died, no one became wise. He who reads 'Love' becomes wise.

Translation: Books didn't make the world wise. He who reads 'Love' is truly wise.
item.guid: पोथी पढ़ि पढ़ि जग मुआ, पंडित भया न कोय । ढाई आखर प्रेम का, पढ़े सो पंडित होय ॥492956
